label: Uncomplicated hives without anaphylaxis or mucosal lesions
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated hives or urticaria.
No anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, mucosal lesions, systemic illness, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed allergy plan.
exclusion_criteria: Anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, mucosal lesions, skin peeling, target lesions, systemic illness, infection concern, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed allergy plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, allergy, urgent care, or the ED if symptoms are not improving or your clinician told you to recheck.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports hives framing, trigger avoidance, antihistamine use, and emergency warning signs for breathing or throat symptoms. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated hives without anaphylaxis, mucosal lesions, systemic illness, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed allergy plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports hives framing, trigger avoidance, antihistamine use, and emergency warning signs for breathing or throat symptoms. Autonomous expansion approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated hives without anaphylaxis, mucosal lesions, systemic illness, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed allergy plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated hives or urticaria
no anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, mucosal lesions, systemic illness, or specialist-directed allergy plan documented
